build.beforeBuildCommand: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ../dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item ../index.html ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../js ../dist/js; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../styles ../dist/styles; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../assets ../dist/assets; Copy-Item -Force modcn.txt target/release/modcn.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ../dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item ../index.html ../dist/; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../js ../dist/js; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../styles ../dist/styles; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../assets ../dist/assets"

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://launchercontent.mojang.com https://cdn.modrinth.com https://media.forgecdn.net https://mc-heads.net https://crafthead.net data:; connect-src 'self' https: http://localhost; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
